overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a vehicle driving on an elevated highway at dusk. The journey passes industrial cooling towers, close-proximity billboard walls, and approaches a neon-lit urban district with moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with industrial backdrop

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the highway toward an industrial zone with a large cooling tower visible in the hazy distance

notable_agents.action: sedan driving ahead in the same lane maintaining distance

entered.detail: large concrete cooling tower emitting steam into the hazy sky
metal safety barrier with yellow and black diagonal hazard stripes
tall metal pylons with horizontal cable arrays lining the highway
factory structures with metal scaffolding and industrial equipment
dark mountain outline visible against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide elevated highway at dusk, driving toward an industrial district. A massive cooling tower dominates the distant center view while factory structures line the left side. The vehicle maintains a steady speed among moderate traffic, with metal guardrails and overhead catenary structures defining the right side of the roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with close-proximity illuminated billboard wall

events.description: vehicle drifts to the right lane driving extremely close to the billboard wall

agents.ego_description: driving in the rightmost lane with billboard advertisements passing by at close proximity

entered.detail: continuous wall of large illuminated advertisements including Allworld Insurance, Valentino, and Arasaka branding

segments.scene_description: The vehicle moves into the right lane, bringing it within close proximity to a massive wall of illuminated billboards. Various advertisements for insurance, fashion, and corporations like Arasaka scroll past. The industrial backdrop fades into the haze as the camera focuses on the detailed advertisements filling the right side of the frame.

events.description: vehicle moves away from the billboard wall back toward the center lane

agents.ego_description: driving on the open highway toward the city center with neon signage becoming prominent on the left

notable_agents.action: large truck overtaking in the left lane

entered.detail: large illuminated pink and red neon commercial signs lining the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle returns to the center of the highway, leaving the billboard wall behind. The scene opens up to reveal a neon-lit urban district ahead, with large pink and red illuminated signs lining the left side. The mountain silhouette remains visible in the distance as traffic increases and the city lights become more prominent against the darkening dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated highway that transforms from a stark industrial zone into a vibrant, neon-lit urban district at dusk. It begins with a steady forward motion toward a massive cooling tower and factory structures, framed by metal guardrails and overhead catenary lines. As the vehicle shifts into the right lane, the industrial backdrop fades into a haze, replaced by a towering wall of illuminated corporate billboards and scrolling advertisements that dominate the frame. The scene then opens up as the vehicle returns to the center of the highway, leaving the billboards behind to reveal a cityscape of glowing pink and red signs. Finally, the camera pushes further into the darkening dusk, where the distant mountain silhouette lingers behind an increasing flow of traffic and the intensifying lights of the city.
